about.label: About
about.title: Reinventing access to healthcare
about.subtitle: MEDICOPLACE was born from the belief that everyone deserves simple, fast and secure access to quality medical care. Our mission is to connect patients with the best healthcare professionals through technology.
about.missionP1: Founded in 2024, MEDICOPLACE has quickly established itself as the reference for digital health services in Haiti.
about.missionP2: Our platform combines medical consultations, online pharmacy and teleconsultation in a unique ecosystem, designed to simplify the patient care journey.
about.missionP3: With over 500 partner doctors and a growing community of satisfied patients, we build the future of connected healthcare every day.
about.value1Desc: The security and privacy of your data is our absolute priority.
about.value2Desc: Every patient is unique. We offer personalized and human support.
about.value3Desc: We collaborate with the best healthcare professionals to guarantee quality care.
about.value4Desc: Healthcare must be accessible to everyone, everywhere and at all times.
about.teamMember1Desc: A doctor committed to improving access to healthcare in Haiti through digital innovation.
about.teamMoreSoon: Other specialists will be available soon.

services.label: Services
services.title: Complete and accessible health services
services.subtitle: Discover all our medical services, designed to simplify your care journey and improve your quality of life.
services.ctaSubtitle: Book an appointment in a few clicks or contact us for more information about our services.
services.s1Desc: Complete medical consultations with our qualified general practitioners for personalized health monitoring.
services.s2Desc: Consult a doctor from home by video. Fast, secure and accessible throughout Haiti.
services.s3Desc: Order your medications and health products online. Fast and secure home delivery.
services.s4Desc: Access a network of specialist doctors: cardiology, dermatology, pediatrics and more.
services.s5Desc: Book your laboratory tests and medical exams. Results available online quickly.
services.s6Desc: Service directing to the nearest emergencies. First aid advice available 24/7.

teleconsultation.title: Medical Teleconsultation
teleconsultation.subtitle: Consult a qualified doctor by video from home. Fast, secure and reimbursed.
teleconsultation.f1Desc: High-definition video consultations with end-to-end encryption.
teleconsultation.f2Desc: Your medical data is protected with the highest security standards.
teleconsultation.f3Desc: Consult a doctor Monday to Sunday, from 7am to 11pm.
teleconsultation.f4Desc: Message your doctor before and after the consultation.
teleconsultation.f5Desc: Receive your prescription directly in your patient space.
teleconsultation.f6Desc: Accessible from your computer, tablet or smartphone.
teleconsultation.step1Desc: Select an available doctor based on the desired specialty.
teleconsultation.step2Desc: Choose the date and time that suits you.
teleconsultation.step3Desc: Connect at your appointment time from your device.
teleconsultation.step4Desc: Your prescription is immediately available in your space.
teleconsultation.why4: Electronic prescription sent directly to the pharmacy

faq.label: FAQ
faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Quickly find answers to your questions about MEDICOPLACE and our services.
faq.notFoundSubtitle: Our team is available to answer all your questions.
faq.q1: How do I create an account on MEDICOPLACE?
faq.a1: To create your account, click the "Register" button at the top right of the page. Fill in the form with your personal information, choose a secure password, and validate your registration. You will receive a confirmation email.
faq.q2: How do I make an appointment with a doctor?
faq.a2: Once logged in to your account, go to your dashboard and click "Book appointment". Select the desired specialty, choose an available doctor, then reserve a time slot that suits you.
faq.a3: Yes, teleconsultations carried out on MEDICOPLACE may be covered by the main Haitian insurers. Check with your insurance for applicable reimbursement conditions.
faq.q4: How does the online pharmacy work?
faq.a4: Our online pharmacy allows you to order health products, parapharmacy items and over-the-counter medications. For prescription medications, you will need to upload your prescription during the order.
faq.a5: Absolutely. MEDICOPLACE uses end-to-end encryption and complies with the highest health data protection standards. Your data is stored on secure servers and is never shared without your consent.
faq.q6: Can I cancel or modify an appointment?
faq.a6: Yes, you can cancel or modify your appointment from your dashboard up to 24 hours before the scheduled time. Beyond this deadline, please contact our customer service.
faq.q7: What payment methods do you accept?
faq.a7: We accept bank cards (Visa, Mastercard). MonCash and NatCash payments will be available soon. Installment payment is offered for orders over 5,000 Gdes. All transactions are secured by SSL protocol.
faq.q8: How do I contact customer service?
faq.a8: Our customer service will be available soon. In the meantime, visit our Contact page for updated information.
